name: Css.Reset
comment:
This module helps you to reset base styles. You can use them with elm/html.

  - Eric Meyer’s Reset CSS
  - html5doctor.com Reset Stylesheet
  - Normalize.css
  - ress

@docs ericMeyer, html5Doctor, normalize, ress

values.name: ericMeyer
values.comment:
Eric Meyer’s Reset CSS
Version: 2.0
License: none (public domain)
Last Updated: 2011-01-26
Author: Eric Meyer
Original: <https://meyerweb.com/eric/tools/css/reset/>

values.name: html5Doctor
values.comment:
html5doctor.com Reset Stylesheet
Version: 1.6.1
License: Free of charge under a CC0 Public Domain Dedication and MIT License
Last Updated: 2010-09-17
Author: Richard Clark
Original: <https://github.com/richclark/HTML5resetCSS>

values.name: normalize
values.comment:
Normalize.css
Version: 8.0.1
License: MIT
Last Updated: 2018-11-05
Author: Nicolas Gallagher
Original: <https://github.com/necolas/normalize.css/>

values.name: ress
values.comment:
ress
Version: 2.0.4
License: MIT
Last Updated: 2020-01-18
Author: Filipe Linhares
Original: <https://github.com/filipelinhares/ress>

name: Css.Reset.EricMeyer
comment:
Eric Meyer’s Reset CSS which was converted to [rtfeldman/elm-css](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/rtfeldman/elm-css/latest/).

@docs ericMeyer

values.name: ericMeyer
values.comment: Compile it with your elm-css code.
